en: Who are you?
My name is Andy Sachs.
I recently graduated from Northwestern University. And what are you doing here?
Well, I think I could do a good job as your assistant.
ko: 여기는 왜 왔죠? 당신의 어시스턴트로 잘할 수 있을 거라고 생각해서요.

en: And, um...
Yeah, I came to New York to be a journalist
ko: 기자가 되려고 뉴욕에 왔고, 여기저기 지원서를 보냈어요.

en: and sent letters out everywhere
ko: 기자가 되려고 뉴욕에 왔고, 여기저기 지원서를 보냈어요.

en: and then finally got a call from Elias Clark
ko: 그러다 드디어 엘리아스 클라크에서 연락이 왔고,

en: and met with Sherry up at Human Resources,
and basically it's this or Auto Universe. So you don't read Runway?
ko: 기본적으로 여기 아니면 오토 유니버스예요. 그래서 런웨이를 안 읽어요?

en: Uh, no.
And before today, you had never heard of me? No.
ko: 그리고 오늘 전까지 저에 대해 들어본 적도 없었고요?

en: And you have no style or sense of fashion? Well, um...
ko: 네. 스타일이나 패션 감각이 전혀 없군요.

en: I think that depends on what you're...
ko: 글쎄요, 그건 뭐에 따라 다르다고 생각하는데...

en: You know, that wasn't a question.
Um, I was editor-in-chief of the Daily Northwestern.
I also won a national competition for college journalists with my series on the janitor union which exposed the exploitation of
ko: 청소부 노조에 대한 시리즈로 대학 기자 전국 대회에서 우승도 했는데, 착취를 폭로한...

en: Yeah, you know, okay.
You're right. I don't fit in here.
I am not skinny or glamorous,
and I don't know that much about fashion,
but I'm smart.
I learn fast, and I will work very hard.
ko: 빨리 배우고, 정말 열심히 할 거예요.

en: I've got the exclusive on the Cavalli for Gwyneth.
ko: 그위네스한테 입힐 카발리 독점 기사 있어요.

en: But the problem is, with that huge feathered headdress that she's wearing,
ko: 근데 문제는, 그녀가 쓰고 있는 저 거대한 깃털 머리장식 때문에,

en: she looks like she's working the main stage of the Golden Nugget.
ko: 골든 너겟 메인 무대에서 일하는 것 같아 보여요.

en: Thank you for your time.
Is that sad, little person.
Are we doing a before and after piece I don't know about?
ko: 내가 모르는 비포 앤 애프터 기사라도 하는 거야?

en: Accessibility bike
